description: Phase 2 of ADR-2605021400. Land the storage backbone for the loop-closing trio: IExperimentPort trait in hex-core (the contract) and SpacetimeDB tables + reducers in hexflo-coordination (the impl backend). Adapter wiring between them is wp-experiment-loop-p3 (ADR P3). Hexflo-coordination is chosen over a new spacetime-modules/experiment/ since the addition is ~3 tables (~150 lines), well within hexflo-coordination's domain (it already houses swarms, projects, configs, inference tasks).

phases.description: Two parallel artifacts: the Rust port trait (compiles via cargo check -p hex-core) and the SpacetimeDB module additions (compiles via cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown). Both gates blocking — port without backend is half-built, backend without port is unreachable.

gate.command: cargo check -p hex-core && cargo check --manifest-path spacetime-modules/hexflo-coordination/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown

phases.name: IExperimentPort + SpacetimeDB storage

tasks.description: Create hex-core/src/ports/experiment.rs declaring `IExperimentPort` as an async_trait. Imports `crate::domain::experiment::*`. Trait bounds: Send + Sync. Method signatures (verbatim, all Result<_, ExperimentError>): objective_create(&self, project_id: &str, obj: Objective) -> Result<ObjectiveId>; objective_get(&self, id: &ObjectiveId) -> Result<Option<Objective>>; objective_list(&self, project_id: &str) -> Result<Vec<Objective>>; objective_update_status(&self, id: &ObjectiveId, status: ObjectiveStatus) -> Result<()>; hypothesis_create(&self, project_id: &str, h: Hypothesis) -> Result<HypothesisId>; hypothesis_get(&self, id: &HypothesisId) -> Result<Option<Hypothesis>>; hypothesis_list_for_objective(&self, target: &ObjectiveId) -> Result<Vec<Hypothesis>>; hypothesis_update_status(&self, id: &HypothesisId, status: HypothesisStatus) -> Result<()>; verdict_record(&self, project_id: &str, v: Verdict) -> Result<VerdictId>; verdict_get(&self, id: &VerdictId) -> Result<Option<Verdict>>; verdict_list_for_objective(&self, obj: &ObjectiveId) -> Result<Vec<Verdict>>. Add `pub mod experiment;` to hex-core/src/ports/mod.rs preserving alphabetical ordering. Add a #[cfg(test)] mod tests block with a DummyExperimentAdapter that returns ExperimentError::Backend("dummy") for every method, plus a let _: &dyn IExperimentPort = &DummyExperimentAdapter; coercion to assert dyn-compatibility (matches the wp-consolidation-memory-port-p1 P1.3 pattern).
tasks.name: Add IExperimentPort trait + dyn-safety smoke test

tasks.description: Append three tables and their reducers to spacetime-modules/hexflo-coordination/src/lib.rs (do NOT create a new module — hexflo-coordination is chosen per the workplan description). Tables are flat structs with String-encoded enums (SpacetimeDB cannot store Vec or nested enums, per the existing swarm/project pattern). Tables — derive Clone, Debug; #[table(name = X, public)]; #[primary_key] on id: (1) `objective` { id, project_id, name, description, parent_id (empty=none), priority ("critical"|"high"|"medium"|"low"), target_value: f64, comparison ("greater_than"|"greater_than_or_equal"|"less_than"|"less_than_or_equal"|"equal"|"within_range"), comparison_tolerance: f64 (0.0 unless within_range), unit, status ("active"|"achieved"|"abandoned"|"superseded"), created_at, updated_at }. (2) `hypothesis` { id, project_id, content, target_objective_id, predicted_delta: f64, predicted_confidence: f64, verification_plan, adr_id (empty=none), status ("untested"|"confirmed"|"rejected"|"inconclusive"), status_at (empty for untested), status_reason (populated for rejected), created_at }. (3) `verdict` { id, project_id, trial_id, hypothesis_id, objective_id, baseline_score: f64, trial_score: f64, delta: f64, confidence: f64, decision ("graduate"|"hold"|"rollback"|"inconclusive"), decision_until (for hold), decision_reason (for rollback), archived_at, notes }. Reducers — pattern matches existing register_project (early validation, find-then-update-or-insert, return Err(String) on validation failure): `objective_create(ctx, id, project_id, name, description, parent_id, priority, target_value, comparison, comparison_tolerance, unit, created_at)`; `objective_update_status(ctx, id, status, updated_at)` — returns Err if id missing; `hypothesis_create(ctx, id, project_id, content, target_objective_id, predicted_delta, predicted_confidence, verification_plan, adr_id, created_at)` — returns Err if target_objective_id is empty or unknown; `hypothesis_update_status(ctx, id, status, status_at, status_reason)`; `verdict_record(ctx, id, project_id, trial_id, hypothesis_id, objective_id, baseline_score, trial_score, delta, confidence, decision, decision_until, decision_reason, archived_at, notes)` — returns Err if hypothesis_id or objective_id unknown. Place the new section under a `// ─── Experimental loop (ADR-2605021400) ─` banner consistent with existing section banners. Do not modify any existing tables or reducers.
tasks.name: Add objective/hypothesis/verdict tables + reducers to hexflo-coordination
